name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Chicken breast: Cut into halves lengthwise. Skinned, boned, and weighs about 2 1/4 pounds total.
2. Prepare spinach: Use 1/2 of a 10-ounce package frozen spinach, thawed and drained.
3. Combine cheese and Italian seasoning in a small mixing bowl. Roll chicken pieces in the cheese mixture to coat lightly; set aside the remaining mixture.
4. Arrange chicken pieces in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
5. Cook onion in hot margarine until tender. Stir in flour, then add milk all at once. Cook and stir until bubbly.
6. Add drained spinach and pimiento to the saucepan; stir well.
7. Spoon the spinach mixture over the chicken pieces.
8. Sprinkle remaining cheese mixture over the top.
9. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 30 to 35 minutes or until tender.
~PER SERVING: 202 calories, 30g Protein, 4g Carbohydrates, 7g Fat, 77mg Cholesterol, 213mg Sodium, 361mg Potassium.
~BETTER HOMES AND GARDENS MENU:
CHICKEN PARMESAN - 202 CALORIES
LEMON ASPARAGUS AND CARROTS - 26 CALORIES
PINEAPPLE-PEAR MOLD - 94 CALORIES
PEACH BAVARIAN - 132 CALORIES
